intro: The Copernicus Urban Atlas Product User Manual for 2021 (UA2021 PUM) provides comprehensive guidance for effectively utilising the Urban Atlas data. This manual is targeted at users seeking to understand the product's features, quality, and application guidelines without requiring in-depth technical knowledge. It covers essential information about Urban Atlas characteristics, quality indicators, terms of use, and available support. The manual focuses on the Urban Atlas portfolio, including land cover, land use mapping and change detection derived from Very High Resolution (VHR) Earth Observation imagery and Sentinel-2 data.
